title: Presence Footsteps + Valkyrien Skies Compat
description: Footstep sounds now play correctly on Valkyrien Skies ships!
body:
A small compatibility patch that fixes footstep sounds not playing when walking on Valkyrien Skies ships.

## Fabric version

Requires
https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps

## Forge version

Requires https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps-forge

Not tested with other forks. (Generally works, I think.)
